{{Quote|Get us into the Quence Sector, Elshandruu Pica. I have friends there.|[[Corran Horn/Legends|Corran Horn]], to [[Keevy Spart]]|<ref name="I,J" />}}
'''Elshandruu Pica''' was a planet in the [[Elshandruu system]]<ref name="CSWE" /> of the [[Quence sector/Legends|Quence sector]], in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]].<ref name="EAOC" />

==Description==
The planet was known as a health resort.<ref name="XW:TBW" /> Within an [[Asteroid field/Legends|asteroid belt]] used as a staging area for [[Pirate/Legends|pirates]], Elshandruu Pica had a [[Color/Legends|red]] [[Moon/Legends|moon]] and two white moons in its [[Orbit/Legends|orbit]].<ref name="CSWE" />

Its capital was [[Picavil]]. The [[City/Legends|city]] was the site of a conglomerate of [[Cantina/Legends|bars]], [[Casino/Legends|casinos]], and restaurants owned and operated by [[Kina Margath]].<ref name="CSWE" /> Picavil also had a [[Spaceport/Legends|spaceport]].<ref name="XW:TBW" />

The City of [[Elshandruu City]] was the location of the Elshandruu Pican hotel/resort [[Margath's on Elshandruu Pica|Margrath's]].<ref name="SWAJ_8_110" /><ref name="SWAJ_14_">[[Star Wars Adventure Journal 14|''Star Wars Adventure Journal'' 14]]</ref> The resort made galactic news when it was robbed twice in a two-day period by the infamous [[Tanda Marelle|Tombat]].<ref name="SWAJ_8_110" />

When [[Serv-O-Droid, Inc./Legends|Serv-O-Droid, Inc.]] went bankrupt, it operated in name only through a remainder house on Elshandruu Pica.

==History==
{{Quote|Captain Yonka made his rounds, visited his mistress on Elshandruu Pica—he's seeing the Moffs wife, though the Moff believes he's bedding the owner of a local resort.|[[Fliry Vorru]], to [[Ysanne Isard]]|<ref name="XW:TBW" />}}
During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], the planet was ruled by [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Riit Jandi]]. At some point, [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Sair Yonka]] and the [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]] [[Freedom|''Avarice'']] went to Elshandruu Pica and fought the pirates in the neighboring asteroid belt. He later kept a suite in the [[27th Hour Social Club]] and used it to secretly meet the Moff's wife, [[Aellyn Jandi|Aellyn]].<ref name="XW:TBW" />

[[Corellian/Legends|Corellian]] commodities shipper [[Tev Driscull]] lost his ship, the [[Lantillian ShipWrights/Legends|Lantillian]] [[GX1 short hauler/Legends|Short Hauler]] ''[[Nova Whisper]]'', to the [[Privateer/Legends|privateer]] [[Dharus]] while they were at Elshandruu Pica.<ref name="SS_">''[[Stock Ships]]''</ref>

During the [[Bacta War]], [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron's]] members went to Elshandruu Pica in order to convince Sair Yonka to defect. He accepted and joined the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] to fight [[Ysanne Isard]].<ref name="XW:TBW" />
